examples: We had to wait in line at immigration.
The immigration officer checked my passport.
context: I got stopped at immigration. I'm going in a different room and I started panicking.

We recently flew from South Korea to the US and even as an American, I get very nervous entering the US, going through security, going through immigration. It can just be very nerve-wracking and usually we have no problem but recently for the first time ever, he got pulled into the secondary room.

examples: I made a reservation for 7 pm.
You need a reservation at that restaurant.
context: When they're asking you a question, yes, no date name. Don't elaborate. Don't elaborate and don't say, I don't know. Maybe you could say, let me check. Let me double check. Where are you staying? Let me double check. Can I check my reservation? Something like this, right? When you couldn't understand what he said, you can also say, could you repeat that again so that you can answer it correctly? Exactly.
